She wears an extravagant, textured dress with ruffled layers and a cinched waist, accented by a dark blue belt, revealing one bare shoulder for an elegant yet bold statement. The artwork should have a sense of depth and dimensionality,with intricate details and textures that make it look like a real-life scene.
